vocab.meaning: chuyên môn sư phạm dày dặn
vocab.example: His pedagogical expertise allowed him to tailor complex physics concepts to each student's individual learning style.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng một môi trường hòa nhập/không phân biệt
vocab.example: She was my favorite because she knew how to foster an inclusive environment where even the quietest students felt safe to speak up.

vocab.meaning: một nhân vật có khả năng thay đổi cuộc đời/tư duy
vocab.example: Looking back, my English teacher was a transformative figure who shifted my entire perspective on social justice.

vocab.meaning: có uy quyền, khiến người khác phải nể phục
vocab.example: He didn't need to be strict; he could command authority simply through his immense passion and presence in the classroom.

vocab.meaning: ca ngợi ai đó hết lời
vocab.example: All the alumni still praise her to the skies because of how much she cared about our professional development.
She would walk into the room and radiate enthusiasm, making it impossible not to get excited about biology.

vocab.meaning: là tấm gương cho sự xuất sắc
vocab.example: My math tutor truly exemplified excellence, showing us that precision and creativity could go hand in hand.

vocab.meaning: một người biết lắng nghe và thấu cảm
vocab.example: More than just a teacher, he was an empathetic listener who supported us through the typical turmoils of adolescence.

vocab.meaning: thách thức những quan niệm truyền thống/lối mòn
vocab.example: Her philosophy classes were brilliant because she constantly encouraged us to challenge the status quo.

vocab.meaning: để lại một dấu ấn không thể phai mờ
vocab.example: His mentorship left an indelible mark on my character, instilling in me a sense of integrity I carry to this day.
